dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7298 IH: Connecting Communities Through Transit Planning Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Simon (for herself and Ms. Jacobs) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To amend the Federal Public Transportation Act of 2012 to alter project eligibility for the transit-oriented development planning grant program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Connecting Communities Through Transit Planning Act of 2026.

section.header: Grant program for transit-oriented development planning

subsection.text: Section 20005(b) of the Federal Public Transportation Act of 2012 (49 U.S.C. 5303 note) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the subsection heading by striking Pilot program and inserting Grant program;

subparagraph.text: in subparagraph (A) by striking means a new fixed guideway capital project or a core capacity improvement project, as those terms are defined in section 5309 of title 49, United States Code, as amended by this division. and inserting

clause.text: a new fixed guideway capital project or a fixed guideway bus rapid transit project, as those terms are defined in section 5309; or
a corridor-based capital investment in an existing fixed guideway system.

subparagraph.text: by striking subparagraph (B) and inserting the following:

The term predevelopment activities includes planning, site evaluation, engineering and architectural design, community engagement, feasibility studies, utility coordination, accessibility assessments, and other activities necessary to prepare a site for transit-oriented development.
in the matter preceding subparagraph (A) by inserting and predevelopment activities after planning;

clause.text: by striking infrastructure and inserting and address infrastructure and utility; and
by striking and at the end;

subparagraph.text: in subparagraph (F) by striking the period at the end; and
by inserting at the end the following:

improve access to transit and transit-oriented development sites for all users, including individuals with disabilities, seniors, veterans, and other transit-dependent populations, to ensure people of all ages and abilities can safely and efficiently reach and navigate transit stations and transit-oriented developments, including through paratransit connectivity and bicycle infrastructure.
in subparagraph (D) by inserting and predevelopment activities after plan; and
in subparagraph (E)(iii) by inserting and predevelopment activities after plan; and

paragraph.text: by adding at the end the following:
In addition to any amounts appropriated under section 5338, there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subsection $75,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2027 through 2031.

subsection.text: Section 20005(b) of the Federal Public Transportation Act of 2012 (49 U.S.C. 5303 note) is transferred to appear as subsection (s) of section 5303 of title 49, United States Code.
